  "findings": [
    "Pneumatic pressure test conducted without establishing a mandatory exclusion zone"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop the pneumatic test and depressurize the system safely",
    "Evacuate all non-essential personnel from the test area",
    "Establish a secure physical barrier and post warning signs to define the exclusion zone before resuming"
  ],
  "rationale": "Pneumatic testing stores extremely high levels of elastic energy compared to hydrostatic testing. Conducting a pneumatic test without a cleared, barricaded exclusion zone presents an immediate, critical safety hazard of catastrophic failure and projectile release.",

    "ASME B31.3 §345.5",
    "ASME B31.3 §345.2.1"
  ]
